en.stmt.label: A robotic cell engineering company
en.stmt.text: We design machines that design medicine - robotic islands that culture, perturb, and read living cells with the patience of an artisan and the cadence of a metronome.
en.partners.title: Built with the best.
en.cap.title: Three disciplines,
en.cap.intro: Modular robotic islands run 24/7 across cell culture, assay, and analytics - orchestrated by a single scheduler.
en.cap.c1.t: Autonomous wet labs that never sleep
en.cap.c1.d: Modular robotic islands run 24/7 across cell culture, assay, and analytics - orchestrated by a single scheduler designed in-house in Cambridge.
en.cap.c2.d: A closed-loop pipeline turns hypothesis into wet-lab evidence inside a single working week - collapsing months of conventional screening.
en.cap.c3.d: Trained on petabytes of proprietary perturbation data, our models propose, prioritize, and re-design experiments without a human in the loop.
en.stat.heading: Key figures
en.testi.t1.q: Neura/Bio collapsed a six-month screening campaign into a single week. The platform's reproducibility is genuinely unmatched.
en.testi.t2.q: Their robotic islands run with a cadence our manual labs could never match. We scaled three programs in parallel without hiring.
en.testi.t3.q: The closed-loop pipeline is the first time a platform has proposed an experiment we hadn't already thought of - and been right.
en.faq.title: Questions
en.faq.intro: Everything we get asked before a demo.
en.faq.q1: Do you work with academic labs?
en.faq.a1: Yes. We partner with institutes on shared-risk programs and offer subsidized access for peer-reviewed, pre-competitive research.
en.faq.q2: What cell types do you support?
en.faq.a2: Adherent and suspension mammalian lines, organoids, and primary patient-derived cultures. iPSC workflows are in late beta.
en.faq.q3: How long is a typical experiment?
en.faq.a3: Most perturbation screens complete within five working days end-to-end, including analytics. Larger panels scale linearly.
en.faq.a4: You do. All raw and processed data is delivered in open formats and deleted from our systems 90 days after handoff, unless you opt in to retention.

en.closing.sub: Book a live demo and watch a perturbation screen run end-to-end on the floor.
